title: Support  - App page Cancel
scenario: Cancel (X) button on the App page in the Support section dismisses the screen and returns to the Support first screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the Menu icon or navigate to the Support section.
On the Support screen, tap the App page option.
Once the App page is displayed, tap the Cancel (X) button located on the screen.
expected: The App page is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support first screen.
